name: discogs
description: Scraping multi-sorgente di metadati musicali: Discogs (barcode/titolo), MusicBrainz + Cover Art Archive (fallback barcode), Deezer (copertine HD). Supporta CD, LP, vinili, cassette.
author: Fabiodalez

hooks.name: scrape.sources
hooks.description: Registers Discogs in the scraping source list

hooks.name: scrape.fetch.custom
hooks.description: Fetches metadata from Discogs API (with MusicBrainz fallback)

hooks.name: scrape.data.modify
hooks.description: Enriches data with Discogs covers and tracklists

hooks.name: scrape.isbn.validate
hooks.description: Accepts 12/13-digit UPC/EAN barcodes (not just ISBNs) for music scraping

features: Generi/stili Discogs salvati come parole chiave
Fallback MusicBrainz + Cover Art Archive per barcode
